hero.title: Voice-to-text, instantly on your Mac.
hero.description: Hold a key, talk, release. Text is pasted into any app. 100% on-device.
footer.description:
100% local voice-to-text for your Mac.
No cloud, no subscription, no limits.
index.cta.title: Ready to Fly?
index.cta.description: Your voice. Your Mac. Your flow. No cloud, no limits.

how.title: Simple as 1-2-3
how.step1.title: Hold
how.step1.desc: Press and hold your configurable hotkey. A floating indicator appears on screen.
how.step2.title: Speak
how.step2.desc: Speak naturally in your language. Audio is recorded locally through your preferred microphone.
how.step3.title: Release
how.step3.desc: Release the key. In seconds, text is automatically pasted into whatever app you're using.
features.title:
Built with the
speed of thought.
features.subtitle: Every feature is designed to make voice your primary input method. Seamless, private, and remarkably intelligent.
features.item1.title: 100% Local & Private
features.item1.desc: Your voice never leaves your Mac. Zero data sent to servers. Works completely offline.
features.item2.title: 99 Languages
features.item2.desc: Support for 99 languages with automatic detection or manual selection. From Portuguese to Japanese.
features.item3.title: 3 AI Models
features.item3.desc: Choose between speed and accuracy: Base, Small, or Large v3 Turbo.
features.item4.title: Pastes Into Any App
features.item4.desc: Works globally in Slack, Notion, VS Code, and more. Your clipboard is automatically preserved.
features.item5.title: Configurable Hotkey
features.item5.desc: Use Fn, Caps Lock, or any key combination. Customize the shortcut to fit your flow.
features.item6.title: Microphone Selection
features.item6.desc: Pick any connected device: Built-in, USB Pro mics, AirPods, or Continuity Camera.
features.item7.title: Native Menu Bar App
features.item7.desc: No Dock icon or windows. Access everything from a single waveform icon in your menu bar.
features.item8.title: Recording Overlay
features.item8.desc: Subtle visual pulsing feedback while you record. Visible across all spaces and apps.
features.tabs.group1.title: Everything you need.
features.tabs.f1.title: Paste Anywhere
features.tabs.f1.desc: The app automatically types the text right where your cursor is, no Cmd+V needed. Works magically in Slack, Notion, or VS Code.
features.tabs.f2.title: Global Hotkeys
features.tabs.f2.desc: Start transcribing from any screen or app instantly using customizable keyboard shortcuts.
features.tabs.f3.title: Mic Selection
features.tabs.f3.desc: Easily switch between internal microphones, Bluetooth headsets, or studio mics on the fly.
features.tabs.f4.title: Multilingual Support
features.tabs.f4.desc: Whisper seamlessly recognizes and switches between languages without manual configuration.
features.tabs.f5.title: Native AI Models
features.tabs.f5.desc: Native transcription models optimized to use the full power of your Apple silicon chip.
features.tabs.f6.title: Smart Recording
features.tabs.f6.desc: Record straight from the menu bar without opening any app. AI auto-punctuates based on your rhythm.
features.tabs.f7.title: Recording Overlay
features.tabs.f7.desc: A minimalist floating interface ensures you always know when your microphone is listening.
features.tabs.f8.title: 100% Offline & Private
features.tabs.f8.desc: Zero cloud data. Your recordings never leave your computer ensuring complete safety.
privacy.title:
Designed for
privacy from day one.
privacy.desc: Your voice is personal. We treat it that way. Recorded audio is transcribed locally and deleted immediately after.
privacy.row1.label: Audio Processing
privacy.row2.label: Audio Sent to Servers
privacy.row3.label: Works Offline
privacy.row4.label: Training on Data
privacy.row5.label: Storage
privacy.quote: "While others process audio in the cloud, we process everything on your Mac's chip."
testimonials.title:
Don't just take
our word for it.
testimonials.subtitle: Professionals, developers, and creators sharing their unedited experiences.

testimonials.list.name: Alex Vance
testimonials.list.content: I use this mostly for writing long PR descriptions and Jira tickets. Occasionally misses a technical acronym, but otherwise it's significantly faster than typing.

testimonials.list.name: Sarah Jenkins
testimonials.list.content: The local processing is what sold me. I don't want my drafts sitting on some random server. It's fast on my M2 MacBook Air and doesn't destroy the battery.

testimonials.list.name: David Cho
testimonials.list.content: Took me a couple of days to build the muscle memory for the hotkey, but now I use it for almost all my Slack replies. Solid tool.

testimonials.list.name: Emily Rostova
testimonials.list.content: Due to client confidentiality, cloud dictation was always a no-go. Having an offline transcriber that actually works accurately is a massive time saver for case notes.

testimonials.list.name: Marcus Thorne
testimonials.list.content: Honestly, I just bought it because I hate paying monthly subscriptions for basic utilities. It does exactly what it says on the tin. No complaints.

testimonials.list.name: Jessica Albright
testimonials.list.content: I dictate my initial research thoughts into Notion. It handles my weird academic jargon surprisingly well, though I still have to fix punctuation sometimes.

testimonials.list.name: Ryan Gallagher
testimonials.list.content: Great for logging CRM updates after calls. It runs quietly in the background. Does one thing and does it well.

testimonials.list.name: Megan Weller
testimonials.list.content: I spend half my day writing emails. Voice typing them just feels more natural. The 'small' model is plenty accurate and super fast.

testimonials.list.name: Omar Farooq
testimonials.list.content: Simple, native Mac app. Doesn't try to be an entire workspace, just inputs text wherever my cursor is. Exactly what I was looking for.

testimonials.list.name: Chloe Mitchell
testimonials.list.content: I use it to document my Figma files. The only downside is I look a bit crazy talking to my screen in the office, but the speed increase is worth it.

testimonials.list.name: Tom Peterson
testimonials.list.content: I tried built-in Apple dictation, but it would constantly turn off or misunderstand me. This Whisper implementation is noticeably better.

testimonials.list.name: Amanda Chen
testimonials.list.content: I needed something strictly offline for patient session notes. It's reliable. Sometimes requires me to speak a bit clearer than usual.

testimonials.list.name: Kevin Brooks
testimonials.list.content: I got the lifetime license to avoid another monthly fee. It uses a bit of RAM on the large model, but on my M3 Pro I barely notice it.

testimonials.list.name: Rachel Dawes
testimonials.list.content: Pasting directly into the active app is great. I use it mostly in Google Docs and Superhuman. Good utility app for the price.

testimonials.list.name: Samuel L.
testimonials.list.content: It’s practically replaced my keyboard for initial script drafting. Once you get used to speaking your punctuation, it's a breeze.

testimonials.list.name: Lisa V.
testimonials.list.content: Answering tickets all day was killing my wrists. This has actually helped a lot with my RSI. Recommended.

testimonials.list.name: Brian O'Connor
testimonials.list.content: Really straightforward to set up. You download the model once and you're good. Nice to have software that you actually own again.

testimonials.list.name: Natalie Port
testimonials.list.content: I've tried a few SaaS tools for this, but the latency always annoyed me. Since this runs on my Mac's chip, text appears almost instantly.

testimonials.list.name: Jason Hughes
testimonials.list.content: I actually use it directly in VS Code for writing code comments and readme files. It surprisingly gets most of my technical terms right.

testimonials.list.name: Hannah G.
testimonials.list.content: Drafting follow-up emails is much less tedious now. Plain, reliable offline tool without unnecessary bloat.

pricing.title: One price. Forever.
pricing.desc: No subscriptions. No cloud costs. Just a powerful tool you own for life.
pricing.free.name: Free Trial
pricing.free.desc: Try all features for 3 days. No credit card required.
pricing.paid.name: Lifetime License
pricing.paid.desc: One-time payment. All features included forever.
pricing.why.title: Why avoid subscriptions?
pricing.why.desc: Competitors cost $12–15/month ($144–$180/year). With Whisper Transcriber, you pay once and use it forever. It's yours.
faq.title:
Common
questions.
faq.a1: Hold a hotkey, speak, release. Your audio is transcribed locally on your Mac using AI (Whisper models) and the text is automatically pasted into the frontmost app.
faq.a2: No. After downloading the AI model once (142–574 MB), everything works 100% offline.
faq.q3: Is my data sent to any server?
faq.a3: Never. All processing happens locally on your Mac. The temporary audio file is deleted immediately after transcription.
faq.a4: 99 languages, including English, Spanish, Portuguese, French, German, Japanese, Chinese, and many more. You can select manually or use auto-detection.
faq.q5: Does it work with any app?
faq.a5: Yes. Whisper Transcriber uses the macOS Accessibility API to paste text into any app that has a Paste function - text editors, email, Slack, browsers, terminals, and more.
faq.q6: Is it compatible with Intel Macs?
faq.a6: No. Whisper Transcriber requires Apple Silicon (M1 or later) to run AI models locally via CoreML and Apple Neural Engine.
faq.support.title: Need more help?
faq.support.desc: We respond to all support emails within 24 hours.
